THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 255 RED ROCK WAY, #205H, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1997, JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES IS AGAINST DEFENDANT WILLIAM SHAPIRO AND ANY PERSONS OCCUPYING THE PREMISES WITH DEFENDANT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 255 RED ROCK WAY, #205H, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,560.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,560.00, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-1997, JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES IS AGAINST DEFENDANT WILLIAM SHAPIRO AND ANY PERSONS OCCUPYING THE PREMISES WITH DEFENDANT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
